full_text:
CELLCYCLE

RAD51

**CyclinA**

**PCNA**

**p21**

gamma

**What happened in the validations with p27,CyclinD? Do we still have
the slides?**

**ANTIBODIES**

CANCER

**PanCK**

**PAX8**

MYELOID

**CD11c**

MACROPHAGES

**[CD68]{.underline}**

**CD163 (M2)**

Markers for resident macrophages vary according to the sampling place.
Suggested targets:

(CD163)

CD206

MDSC:

**CD11b**

**CD14**

CD15

HLA-DR

In human peripheral blood mononuclear cell (PBMC), the equivalent to
PMN-MDSC are defined as CD11b+CD14−CD15+ or CD11b+CD14−CD66b+ and M-MDSC
as CD11b+CD14+HLA-DR−/loCD15−. CD33 myeloid marker can be used instead
of CD11b since very few CD15+ cells are CD11b−

NEUTROPHILS

Citrullinated histone H3 (cit-H3) - NETosis

Neutrophil elastase

TANs expressing additional markers typically expressed on
antigen-presenting cells, but not on circulating neutrophils, such as
HLA-DR, CD14, CD206, CD86 and CCR7.

LYMPHOID

CD3

**CD4**

**CD8**

**CD20**

**CD45 RO (memory)**

PD-1/PD-L1, CTLA-4, TIM-3, LAG-3, FOXP3

For CD8 tumor-educated T cells:

CD137:engagement in T cells
https://cancerci.biomedcentral.com/articles/10.1186/s12935-020-01605-0

STROMA

Vimentin

a-SMA(hi/lo-iCAFs)

FATP2 (iCAFs, also in other cell types as neutrophils)

MHCII (iCAFs)

--

EMT

Zeb1 + Vimentin

DDR

HR

NHEJ

ALT-EJ

BER

NER
